name: Wesley & Kathy's World-Famous Killer 4-star Venison Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Venison should be cut from the neck or shoulder.
2. Dissolve masa in about 1/4 c water.
3. Saute the meat in the oil until about half browned. Add onions and garlic and saute until onions are tender, but not brown.
4. Add chili powder, coriander, and cumin, and cook, stirring, for 4 - 5 minutes. Do not allow to burn.
5. Add beer and water/broth and simmer, stirring frequently until meat is tender (About 45 minutes - 1 hour).
6. When meat is tender, stir in masa, dissolved in water or broth. Simmer, stirring frequently an additional 30 minutes or so.
7. Allow chili to cool and sit for at least 6 hours before reheating and serving.
